documentation_accuracy_summary: ACCURATE. docs/development/api-conventions.md line 115 now lists MilestoneFourForumsFoundation1780890123767 in the reviewed migration set, matching reviewedMigrationClasses in database.config.ts. test_sufficiency_summary: SUFFICIENT. Tests cover all four acceptance criteria dimensions: entity instantiation (all four classes), vocabulary constants (forumBoardScopeTypes and forumBoardVisibilities contain required values), structural properties (deletedAt on topic and post, quotedPostId on post), dynamic-module shape validation (register() returns correct NestJS DynamicModule shape), API_ENVIRONMENT provider assertion (value equals the passed environment), and migration registration validation (reviewedMigrationNames includes MilestoneFourForumsFoundation1780890123767). No endpoint surface exists in ST1 so no service/controller tests are expected.
